diagrams.title: Two-Phase Commit Protocol Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the complete flow of 2PC with Prepare and Commit phases between coordinator and participants
diagrams.purpose: Understanding atomic commit protocol across distributed systems

diagrams.title: Three-Phase Commit Protocol
diagrams.description: Extended 2PC with PreCommit phase showing non-blocking commit protocol
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how 3PC eliminates the blocking problem of 2PC

diagrams.title: Nested Transaction Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Hierarchical structure showing parent transaction with child sub-transactions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding structure and failure handling in nested distributed transactions

diagrams.title: Blocking Problem in 2PC
diagrams.description: Illustrates the scenario where coordinator fails after Prepare phase causing participant blocking
diagrams.purpose: Understanding limitations of 2PC and need for 3PC or alternatives

visuals.title: Flat And Nested Distributed Transactions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for flat and nested distributed transactions
